blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Add evidence for inspection date visibility
Verify that the date of the last inspection is visible on the equipment tag/QR code.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: The evidence provided does not confirm the requirement for the visibility of the date of the last inspection on the equipment tag/QR code.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the visibility of the date of the last inspection on the equipment tag/QR code. However, the evidence only discusses the failed inspection status of a specific forklift and does not provide any information regarding the visibility of the last inspection date. Therefore, it is inconclusive whether this requirement is satisfied or not.
gaps: No evidence confirming the visibility of the date of the last inspection on the equipment tag/QR code.
